title: Ma chérie
caption: Fun song with a bit of French
about: I made this song as part of a songwriting challenge.
lyrics:
Ma chérie
C’est la vie
Such is life
Can’t you see?
Ma chérie
Ma chérie
My sweetheart
Be sweet for me

Oooooooh can you
Be sweet for me?
Give me a taste
Ma chérie
I see the love in your face

Oooooooh can you
Be sweet for me?
Be sweet for me
Be sweet for me

Mon amour
Slow it down
Say my name
No big sound
Ma chérie
Look at me
Such is love
Let it be

Oooooooh can you
Be sweet for me?
Give me a taste
Ma chérie
I see the love in your face

Oooooooh can you
Be sweet for me?
Be sweet for me
Be sweet for me

Come real close
Say it soft
If it’s sweet
That’s enough

J’ai besoin de rien, j’veux pas la gloire
Juste ton regard quand tu dis mon nom
Slow motion vibes, on prend notre histoire
Pas de pression, pas d’illusion

Honey drip words, you talk so sweet
Même ton silence me fait bouger
Je joue pas dur, I don’t compete
Mais pour toi, yeah, I might lean

On parle de rien, et tout s’allume
Tes yeux brillent, j’perds le fil
No games, no scene, just you and me
Si c’est réel, I’m in for real

Du sucre sur ta langue, douceur dans l’air
Every little look, I’m already there
Si tu dis oui, j’ai tout ce qu’il faut
Be sweet for me — that’s all I know

Can you
Be sweet for me?
Give me a taste
Ma chérie
I see the love in your face

Oooooooh can you
Be sweet for me?
Be sweet for me
Be sweet for me
